category_sources: Official Exercism docs describe solving exercises locally with the CLI.
source_facts.description: command-line tool to interact with exercism.io.
display_name_sources: Official Exercism docs call it the Exercism Command Line Interface.
docs_sources: Official Exercism docs include installing, configuring, downloading, submitting, troubleshooting, and CLI help guidance.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/exercism/cli, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Exercism docs describe local exercise download, submission, and learning workflows.
source_facts.description identifies the Exercism command-line tool.
